summary: iter248 testing complete - MyEcho Staff endpoints (10 routes), POS Rings ingestion, PWA manifests with distinct logos, Install Hub, and docked RESV card all verified. 22/22 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed MyEcho dashboard renders with all 6 tabs, Install Hub shows both QR codes with OS-detect instructions, and ECW mobile shows docked RESV card (not floating banner).

issues: Transient 'Error loading Sidebar/SystemSettings' messages appeared during testing - likely race condition on initial load, resolved on retry

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed corrupted /app/public/manifest.json - had duplicate JSON content causing parse errors. Now properly references echo-aurion-mgr-*.png icons.
MyEcho endpoints use hash-based stable demo data when source collections are empty - response includes demo:true flag
POS Rings ingestion supports bulk POST, CSV upload, seed-demo, and clear operations - Reports Hub flips from demo to live when pos_rings collection has data
Docked RESV card correctly replaces floating banner - uses variant='docked' prop in ReservationsLive.tsx
test_credentials: X-User-Id: demo-hourly-001 for MyEcho endpoints, devAuth=1 for frontend
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data and hash-based fallbacks
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter248 features verified: (1) MyEcho Staff has 10 endpoints all working - /me, /schedule, /paystubs, /tax-docs, /pto-balance, /pto-request, /pto-requests, /direct-deposit, /concierge-quick-actions, /clock. (2) POS Rings ingestion has /bulk, /status, /clear, /seed-demo endpoints. (3) PWA manifests: /manifest.json for Echo AURION managers, /manifest-staff.json for MyEcho staff with start_url=/m/me. (4) All 8 icon sizes for both echo-aurion-mgr and myecho-staff verified. (5) Install Hub at /install shows both role cards with QR codes and OS-detect instructions. (6) MyEcho dashboard at /m/me has 6 tabs (home/schedule/pto/pay/docs/concierge) all functional. (7) Docked RESV card in ECW mobile replaces floating banner - shows count/capacity with gold progress rail.

backend_myecho_staff.me: PASS - Returns employee profile with name, title, department, tenure_years
backend_myecho_staff.schedule: PASS - Returns 7 shift rows with date/weekday/shift/hours
backend_myecho_staff.paystubs: PASS - Returns 12 paystubs with YTD totals (gross/net/tips/taxes)
backend_myecho_staff.tax_docs: PASS - Returns W-2 and I-9 documents
backend_myecho_staff.pto_request: PASS - Creates PTO request with pending status
backend_myecho_staff.direct_deposit: PASS - Returns masked bank info with last4

backend_pos_rings.status: PASS - Returns total count and demo_active flag
backend_pos_rings.bulk_ingest: PASS - Accepts array of ring objects, upserts to collection

backend_pwa_manifests.manifest_json: PASS - Echo AURION manifest with start_url=/
backend_pwa_manifests.manifest_staff_json: PASS - MyEcho manifest with start_url=/m/me and 9 icons

frontend_install_hub.role_cards: PASS - Both mgr and staff role cards with QR images
frontend_install_hub.sync_section: PASS - 'How it stays in sync' section visible

frontend_myecho_dashboard.home_tab: PASS - Shows welcome, next shift, PTO remaining, last paycheck
frontend_myecho_dashboard.pto_tab: PASS - Form with start/end dates, submit works
frontend_myecho_dashboard.pay_tab: PASS - Shows YTD KPIs and paystub list
frontend_myecho_dashboard.docs_tab: PASS - Shows tax docs and direct deposit

mocked_apis_note: MyEcho /paystubs and /tax-docs return demo data with stable hash-based amounts since payroll_runs/tax_documents collections are not yet wired to a real payroll provider. Direct deposit returns masked last4 only.
